wizard.title: Welcome to Somra
wizard.subtitle: Set up your media server in a few quick steps.

language.title: Choose your language
language.description: This becomes the system default until users set their own preference.

admin.title: Create admin account
admin.description: This account manages libraries, settings, and users.

library.title: Add your first library
library.description: Point Somra at a folder containing your movies or TV shows.
library.name: Library name
library.pathHint: Use /media in Docker. For local dev (make dev), try ./deploy/media.

defaults.title: Recommended settings
defaults.description: Somra detected your hardware and suggests optimized defaults.

scan.title: Scanning your library
scan.description: Somra is indexing your media. This may take a few minutes.

complete.title: You're all set!
complete.description: Somra is ready. Start browsing your library or adjust settings anytime.

errors.stepFailed: Could not save this step. Try again.
errors.adminFailed: Could not create the admin account.
